30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 World's Greatest Stretch
10m DB Walking Lunge 22.5/15
10 PVC Split Jerk
10 Strict Press

strength.name: Split Jerk
strength.description:
2x2 | *Legs Long
* Pause in catch if you can
* Punch the ceiling | 24min

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
10 min AMRAP
6 Hang power Cleans @60/40
12 Front Rack Reverse Lunges
50 Double Unders
Scale to 50/35
Scale to 100 singles

hypertrophy.reasoning: Quads/glutes saturated by squats and lunges; back/shoulders balance anterior dominance and support overhead stability.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Split Jerk, 2 by 2 at 95 percent. Strength: Back Squat, 1 by 4 at 70 percent. Metcon: AMRAP 10 minutes: 6 Hang power Cleans @60/40, 12 Front Rack Reverse Lunges, 50 Double Unders. For hypertrophy, focus on back, shoulders, arms.
